In the Universal Rasi Chart, Aries is the fire house; Taurus
the second and so on till pisces, which is the 12th house. The 1st
5th and 9th houses in the universal Chart represent East direction.
If one stands facing East and turns clockwise, after East
we get South; after south we get West; after West we get North;
and After North one comes back to East. Thus in Nadi system the
2nd, 6th and lOth Houses of the universal Rasi Chart represent
South dire he 3rd and every successive 5 th Houses of it namely
7th and ll1h represent West Direction. The 4th, 8th and 12th
Houses of the Universal Rasi Chart stand for North Direction.
TO SUM UP:
l-5-9 East (from Aries)
2-6-9 South (from Arises)
3-7-11 West (from Aries)
4-8-12 North (from Aries)

FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADI ASTROLOGY 17
In Nadi Astrology great importance is given to houses
l-5-9, the reason being :-
Starting from Aries where it is East, to the 5th of it is again
